task.name: Summarize Document
task.objective: Generate executive summary of a long document

critical.mandate: Extract key decisions, action items, open questions

step.title: Load Document
step.action: Ask user for document to summarize

step.title: Extract Key Points
step.action: List action items with owners if specified
Capture open questions or unresolved items

step.title: Generate Summary
step.action: Write executive summary: purpose, key findings, decisions, next steps
Include section references for readers who want details

output.location: Displayed to user (not saved unless requested)
